description_text: 4pcs Car Bumper Canard Fin Splitters Diffuser Spoiler Lip Glossy Carbon Fiber Texture • This listing is for two pairs (2 L & 2 R) Front Bumper Canards Splitters for Honda Civic. • Made of high quality ABS plastic with UV-Resistant epoxy coating for a long-lasting result. • Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. • UV-Protected Coating, 100% Weather Proof, Gel-coat Finish • Come with self-adhesive tape for easy, simple installation. Installation: • Simply clean the bumper and remove any dirt or leftover water. • Peel off the double-sided tape, and stick on the bumper. • Allow the tape to adhere onto the surface and use the screws to permanently secure the bumper. Introduction: Quantity: pairs (2 L & 2 R)） Color: Black Material: ABS Size: As the picture show Fitment: Fit on most cars, trucks and SUV Fit Civic Hatchback/Sedan/Coupe Features: This listing is for 4 pieces (2 L & 2 R) 100% Brand New & High Quality Front Bumper Canards Splitters. It can give you a very sport looking, but also can protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages. Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. UV-Protected Coating, 100% Weather Proof. Package Include: 2 small & 2 big canards and installation hardware Notice: Before purchasing, please confirm that the interface of our goods is suitable for your vehicles,For more details, please check the picture and description or contact our customer service.We are not responsible if the customer have ordered wrong parts 1.Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. 2.All dimensions are measured by hand, there may be small deviations. 3.This Is Aftermarket Replacement Item But Not Genuine. 4.All the applications indicated in this posting are for reference only, the part for sale only replace the relevant OEM numbers. If you are not 100% sure this is what you need, please find out your engine model, series number and contact our Customer-service. 1.We accept Payoneer、PayPal、Mastercard、VISA etc. 2.All major credit cards are accepted through secure payment processor. 3.For faster service, please update your correct address before sending payment. Item will be shipped within 24 hours upon receipt of payment, excluding weekends and public holidays. Delivery time is about 14-28 business days and it may take up to 8 weeks to some European countries and South American countries due to strict custom inspection. We ship worldwide. Shipping fee include packing, warehouse , distribution, order handling and processing costs. Please note that some countries will have custom duty or tax for certain items. It is the buyer's responsibility to pay all endued custom duty or tax. We are not responsible for any custom duty or tax since our price do not include this charge. 30-day Warranty with Exchange for defective, malfunctioned, incorrect or parts-missing items. Please notify us and simply return the item with all parts and accessories packed and marked "FOR EXCHANGE" within 30 days of receipt. If defective, malfunctioned or parts-missing items are no longer available, a refund may be issued. Refunds are not generally issued. Special situations are examined on a case to case basis. In most circumstances, Shipping and Handling fee is non-refundable. Please contact us through eBay link if you have any questions. We will reply you within 24 hours. Please check you spam mail if no response for 24 hours. Service Time :GMT 0:00-10:00 (Sundays and Holidays Excepted) Positive feedback will be automatically left to all buyers once they have paid the item or the payment transaction is completed. We highly appreciate that you can contact with us before you leaving Negative feedback or Neutral feedback. It is because leaving Negative feedback or Neutral Feedback is never a good way to resolve problem. We will offer proper arrangement and help to resolve any problem as soon as possible.
